StorageUnit.title: StorageUnit
StorageUnit.description: A physical storage location in the house.

name.description: Name of the storage unit (e.g., Cupboard).

location.description: The room or area where the storage unit is located (e.g., Kitchen, Bedroom).

ownerId.description: The UID of the user who owns this storage unit.

imageUrl.description: Base64 encoded image or URL of the storage unit.

customCategories.description: Custom categories defined by the user.

Item.title: Item
Item.description: An object stored inside a storage unit.

storageId.description: The ID of the storage unit where this item is located.

ownerId.description: The UID of the user who owns this item.

detectedAt.description: Timestamp when the item was detected.

category.description: Category of the item (e.g., kitchen, medication, documents).

description.description: A detailed description of the item.

lastSeenAt.description: Timestamp when the item was last seen or opened.

backupLocation.description: A secondary place where the item might be kept if not in its primary storage.

helpRequested.description: Flag indicating the patient needs help finding this item.

customLabels.description: Custom labels added by the caregiver (e.g., fragile, do not move).

Activity.title: Activity
Activity.description: A scheduled activity for the patient.

ownerId.description: The UID of the user who owns this activity.

itemsToBring.description: List of item IDs to bring.

reminded.description: Whether a reminder has been sent.

completed.description: Whether the activity has been completed.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the activity was created.

/items/{itemId}.description: Collection of items across all storage units.
